title: BetterCoordsCopy
description: Makes the F3 + C Hotkey only copy the necessary coordinates.
body:
# Better Coords Copy

By pressing **F3 + C** Minecraft will by **default** copy following command to your Clipboard:


```
/execute in minecraft:[world] run tp @s X Y Z yaw pitch
```

To easily copy and share your coordinates with your friends in chat, this mod will just copy the **essential** coordinates for example:


```
1435 50 -414
```
